SortExec: output_bytes=35
  ProjectionExec: output_bytes=35
    AggregateExec: output_bytes=35
      ProjectionExec: output_bytes=7748
        CoalesceBatchesExec: output_bytes=7748
          HashJoinExec: output_bytes=7758
            CoalesceBatchesExec: output_bytes=255652
              FilterExec: output_bytes=255692
                ParquetExec: output_bytes=123775060
            ParquetExec: output_bytes=12375000
